seo.title: The 4 Week Gut Protocol Recipes
seo.description: It’s time to feel great again

trainers.bioBodi: Super Trainer and nutrition expert Autumn Calabrese is the creator of The 4 Week Gut Protocol, as well as other breakthrough fitness programs, the cooking show FIXATE, and the Portion Fix eating plan. She’s a certified holistic health coach through the Institute of Integrative Nutrition and has held certifications from NASM and AFPA.

Bobby turned his love of cooking into a successful career. Renowned chef, he’s perfected his skills over 20 years in kitchens from New York to Italy, including many Michelin-starred restaurants. Now he brings his expertise to FIXATE, where he shows you how to make your own healthy, delicious meals.

data.descriptionShort: It’s time to feel great again
data.descriptionLong: Autumn and Bobby bring you balanced and delicious recipes that help keep your gut happy and make you feel great.

modules.categories: Healthy Recipes, Weight Loss, Recovery, Balance

media.title: The Foundation of A Healthy Gut
media.subtitle: 4m

modules.title: What Do I Get with The 4 Week Gut Protocol Recipes?
modules.content: Autumn and Bobby curated a variety of gut-healthy, balanced recipes to help take the guesswork out of planning your meals. These recipes provide a delicious range of options that are easy to make and will help you stay on-track with your gut goals. Optimize these recipes when you pair them with The 4 Week Gut Protocol nutrition program!

modules.title: What Is The 4 Week Gut Protocol?
modules.content: Unaddressed digestive issues can mess with your immune system, energy levels, even your mood. The 4 Week Gut Protocol is a comprehensive nutrition program that shows you how the food you eat impacts your gut health and overall health. Super Trainer and nutrition expert Autumn Calabrese used her journey to gut health to create this easy-to-follow program that can help you stop guessing and start feeling like your best, healthiest self.

trainers.bio: Super Trainer and nutrition expert Autumn Calabrese is the creator of The 4 Week Gut Protocol, as well as other breakthrough fitness programs, the cooking show FIXATE, and the Portion Fix eating plan. She’s a certified holistic health coach through the Institute of Integrative Nutrition and has held certifications from NASM and AFPA.

Bobby turned his love of cooking into a successful career. Renowned chef, he’s perfected his skills over 20 years in kitchens from New York to Italy, including many Michelin-starred restaurants. Now he brings his expertise to FIXATE, where he shows you how to make your own healthy, delicious meals.
